limit-up-board.name: 打板策略
limit-up-board.description: A 股打板策略：双轮 LLM 漏斗（强势标的分析 → 连板预测）

stdout-channel.name: Stdout Channel
stdout-channel.description: Reference notification channel — fully consumes the payload but only prints '✔ push success' to stdout.
